---
title: "AI for EDS: Prompting Fundamentals"
subtitle: "Fall | Week 7"
description: "Wednesday, November 09^th^, 2026"
---

*coming soon!*

<!-- NOTE: continue to maintain the AI for EDS website (https://ucsb-meds.github.io/AI-for-EDS/); Add description of that website somewhere on this page and point to materials there -->
